name: [UNIFIED] Multi-Channel Router
description: Normalizes messages from Telegram, WhatsApp (Evolution API), Slack, and Discord into a common struct {user_message, system_prompt_details, last_channel} before passing to the main n8n-claw orchestrator agent.
design_notes: Based on Shabbir n8nclaw Edit Fields pattern (Edit Fields / Edit Fields1 / Edit Fields2 / Edit Fields3)
Each channel trigger feeds its own Edit Fields node normalizing to: user_message, system_prompt_details, last_channel
A Switch node at the response end routes reply back by last_channel value
Memory keyed on username (not chat ID) for cross-channel continuity
WhatsApp via Evolution API webhook (Filter1 pattern from Shabbir)
Telegram trigger + filter pattern from Shabbir (Filter by chat.id)

output_struct.system_prompt_details: string - username/soul/user fields from init table
